# Kenney - Roguelike/RPG Pack

This folder contains the Kenney Roguelike/RPG Pack as a vendor asset for Ash Company.

Recommended use:

- prototype tiles
- small props
- UI/background experiments
- dungeon/ruin layout tests

Avoid using this as the main hero/enemy character source because the art direction is more top-down/front-facing than the side-view combat direction planned for Ash Company.

License details are in `License.txt`.
